translations.en: While I cook, I listen to music.
translations.fr: Pendant que je cuisine, j'écoute de la musique.
translations.de: Während ich koche, höre ich Musik.
translations.ru: Пока я готовлю, я слушаю музыку.
translations.he: בזמן שאני מבשל, אני מקשיב למוזיקה.
translations.vi: Trong khi nấu ăn, tôi nghe nhạc.
translations.nl: Terwijl ik kook, luister ik naar muziek.
translations.uk: Поки я готую, я слухаю музику.
translations.hi: जब मैं खाना बनाती हूँ, तब मैं संगीत सुनती हूँ।
translations.nb: Mens jeg lager mat, hører jeg på musikk.
translations.id: Saat saya memasak, saya mendengarkan musik.
translations.sv: Medan jag lagar mat lyssnar jag på musik.
translations.ro: În timp ce gătesc, ascult muzică.
translations.da: Mens jeg laver mad, lytter jeg til musik.
translations.ja: 料理をしながら音楽を聴きます。

tokens.explanation: Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal subordinate clause.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Common noun functioning as direct object.

sentences.target: Ella lee mientras espera el autobús.

translations.es: Ella lee mientras espera el autobús.
translations.en: She reads while she waits for the bus.
translations.fr: Elle lit en attendant le bus.
translations.de: Sie liest, während sie auf den Bus wartet.
translations.zh-Hans: 她等公交车的时候看书。
translations.pt: Ela lê enquanto espera o ônibus.
translations.he: היא קוראת בזמן שהיא מחכה לאוטובוס.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đọc sách trong lúc đợi xe buýt.
translations.nl: Ze leest terwijl ze op de bus wacht.
translations.uk: Вона читає, поки чекає на автобус.
translations.hi: वह बस का इंतज़ार करते हुए पढ़ती है।
translations.nb: Hun leser mens hun venter på bussen.
translations.sv: Hon läser medan hon väntar på bussen.
translations.ro: Ea citește în timp ce așteaptă autobuzul.
translations.da: Hun læser, mens hun venter på bussen.
translations.ja: 彼女はバスを待ちながら本を読みます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun used as subject.
Finite verb in third person singular present indicative.
Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal subordinate clause.
Finite verb in third person singular present indicative.
Definite article modifying the noun.
Common noun functioning as the object of the determiner.

translations.en: While you talk, I drink coffee.
translations.fr: Pendant que tu parles, je bois du café.
translations.de: Während du redest, trinke ich Kaffee.
translations.ko: 네가 말하는 동안 나는 커피를 마셔요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你说话的时候，我喝咖啡。
translations.ru: Пока ты говоришь, я пью кофе.
translations.pt: Enquanto você fala, eu tomo café.
translations.he: בזמן שאתה מדבר, אני שותה קפה.
translations.vi: Trong khi bạn nói, tôi uống cà phê.
translations.nl: Terwijl jij praat, drink ik koffie.
translations.uk: Поки ти говориш, я п’ю каву.
translations.hi: जब आप बात कर रहे हैं, तब मैं कॉफी पी रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Mens du snakker, drikker jeg kaffe.
translations.id: Saat kamu berbicara, saya minum kopi.
translations.sv: Medan du pratar dricker jag kaffe.
translations.ro: În timp ce vorbești, beau cafea.
translations.da: Mens du taler, drikker jeg kaffe.
translations.fi: Kun sinä puhut, minä juon kahvia.
translations.ja: あなたが話している間、私はコーヒーを飲みます。

tokens.explanation: Subordinating conjunction introducing a temporal subordinate clause.
Finite verb in second person singular present indicative.
Personal pronoun used as explicit subject.
Finite verb in first person singular present indicative.
Common noun functioning as direct object.

translations.en: My brother plays while I clean.
translations.fr: Mon frère joue pendant que je nettoie.
translations.de: Mein Bruder spielt, während ich putze.
translations.ko: 내 남동생은 내가 청소하는 동안 놀아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我弟弟在我打扫的时候玩。
translations.yue: 我細佬喺我執屋嗰陣玩。
translations.ru: Мой брат играет, пока я убираюсь.
translations.pt: Meu irmão brinca enquanto eu limpo.
translations.vi: Em trai tôi chơi trong lúc tôi dọn dẹp.
translations.nl: Mijn broer speelt terwijl ik schoonmaak.
translations.uk: Мій брат грає, поки я прибираю.
translations.hu: A bátyám játszik, miközben én takarítok.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई खेलता है जबकि मैं सफ़ाई करता हूँ।
translations.pl: Mój brat bawi się, kiedy ja sprzątam.
translations.el: Ο αδερφός μου παίζει ενώ εγώ καθαρίζω.
translations.nb: Broren min leker mens jeg rydder.
translations.id: Adik laki-laki saya bermain saat saya membersihkan.
translations.sv: Min bror leker medan jag städar.
translations.ro: Fratele meu se joacă în timp ce eu fac curățenie.
translations.cs: Můj bratr si hraje, zatímco uklízím.
translations.da: Min bror leger, mens jeg gør rent.
translations.fi: Veljeni leikkii sillä aikaa kun siivoan.
translations.ja: 私が掃除している間、弟が遊んでいます。

She reads while she waits for the bus.
While you talk, I drink coffee.
My brother plays while I clean.

Elle lit en attendant le bus.
Pendant que tu parles, je bois du café.
Mon frère joue pendant que je nettoie.

Während du redest, trinke ich Kaffee.

Enquanto você fala, eu tomo café.
